title: Resolution Commending and Congratulating Michael Oboza Concio, Jr of Barangay Mayondon, Los Baños, Laguna for Being the Newest Chess Tournament International Master From the Philippines in the Recently Concluded Eastern Asia Juniors and Girls Chess Championships 2019 Held at Lima Park Hotel in Malvar, Batangas on December 9-16, 2019. (AUTHOR (S): Josephine S. Evangelista, Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio. Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cr
